function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-migrating six requested finance records into YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read inbox-processing, OCR, migration, and finance schema docs, preserved original note bodies, kept canonical paths, and deleted the processed inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run six listed finance docs through the OCR workflow. The workflow docs define OCR as extracting visible data from the existing note text into YAML frontmatter, and the finance schema specifies the required invoice and bill fields.
